scriptDesc: Install ConEmu console emulator and sync ConEmu.xml settings (3 modes: ConEmu + Settings, Settings only, Install only)

messages.notFound: ConEmu not found -- will install now
messages.settingsSourceMissing: ConEmu.xml source not found at {path} -- skipping sync
messages.exportNoSource: ConEmu.xml not found in %APPDATA%\ConEmu -- has ConEmu been launched at least once?
messages.exportComplete: ConEmu settings exported -- ConEmu.xml saved to {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.export: Export ConEmu.xml from machine to repo for backup
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
